mapper.sql: TPDWP.ID, TPDWP.CREATE_BY, TPDWP.CREATE_BY_NAME, TPDWP.CREATE_TIME, TPDWP.UPDATE_BY, TPDWP.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TPDWP.UPDATE_TIME, TPDWP.ODD_TYPE, TPDWP.WORK_DEPT_ID, TPDWP.WORK_DEPT_NAME, TPDWP.MAC_TYPE_CODE, TPDWP.MAC_TYPE_NAME, TPDWP.MAC_NO, TPDWP.MAC_AMOUNT, TPDWP.WORKER_AMOUNT, TPDWP.WORK_CONTENT, TPDWP.REPORT_START_TIME, TPDWP.REPORT_END_TIME, TPDWP.WORK_DURATION, TPDWP.WORK_HOURS, TPDWP.CONFIRM_BY, TPDWP.CONFIRM_BY_NAME, TPDWP.CONFIRM_TIME, TPDWP.FIRST_APPROVE_BY, TPDWP.FIRST_APPROVE_BY_NAME, TPDWP.FIRST_APPROVE_TIME, TPDWP.SECOND_APPROVE_BY, TPDWP.SECOND_APPROVE_BY_NAME, TPDWP.SECOND_APPROVE_TIME, TPDWP.STATUS, TPDWP.REMARK, CREATE_FROM_DEPT, CREATE_FROM_DEPT_NAME, MAC_ID, ODD_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN_LOG(ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, CONFIRM_BY, CONFIRM_BY_NAME, CONFIRM_TIME, FIRST_APPROVE_BY, FIRST_APPROVE_BY_NAME, FIRST_APPROVE_TIME, ODD_TYPE, WORK_DEPT_ID, WORK_DEPT_NAME, MAC_TYPE_CODE, MAC_TYPE_NAME, MAC_NO, MAC_AMOUNT, WORKER_AMOUNT, WORK_CONTENT, REPORT_START_TIME, REPORT_END_TIME, WORK_DURATION, WORK_HOURS, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_FROM_DEPT, CREATE_FROM_DEPT_NAME, MAC_ID, OPERATE_ID, ODD_ID, OPERATE_TYPE, IS_REJECT, REJECT_BY, REJECT_BY_NAME, REJECT_TIME, REJECT_REASON, ABANDONED_BY, ABANDONED_BY_NAME, ABANDONED_TIME, THIRD_APPROVE_BY, THIRD_APPROVE_BY_NAME, THIRD_APPROVE_TIME, ODD_PLAN_NO, ABANDONED_REASON, LOG_TYPE) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{confirmBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{confirmByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmTime}, #{firstApproveBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{firstApproveByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstApproveTime}, #{oddType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workDeptId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workDeptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macAmount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workerAmount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportStartTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{reportEndTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{workDuration, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workHours, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createFromDept, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createFromDeptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{macId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operateId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{oddId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operateType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isReject, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rejectBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rejectByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rejectTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{rejectReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{abandonedBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{abandonedByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{abandonedTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{thirdApproveBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{thirdApproveByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thirdApproveTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{oddPlanNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{abandonedReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
